I am the resident manager of the Hillcrest Apartments at 88 Vine Street. On the evening of December 6th, 2024, around 6:45 PM, tenants on the third floor reported smelling natural gas in the corridor outside unit 312. I went up immediately. The smell was very strong near the utility closet that contains the shared water heater. I evacuated the eight units on that floor and called the gas company. The gas company technician arrived at 7:18 PM and shut off the supply to the building at 7:24 PM. He told me there was a cracked fitting on the supply line above the water heater and that the leak had probably been active for several hours. No one was hospitalized but two elderly tenants were taken to a relative's home for the night because they have respiratory conditions. The building had not had the gas line inspected since 2018 according to the records I keep on site.
